nodes.label: MIDI Input
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI events forwarded to group and all children's modulation chains

nodes.label: MIDI Processor Chain
nodes.description: Group-level MIDI processing before forwarding to children

nodes.label: Active State
nodes.description: Determines which children are active based on FM mode and carrier/modulator indices

nodes.label: EnableFM
nodes.description: Enables FM synthesis between carrier and modulator children

nodes.label: CarrierIndex
nodes.description: Index of the child synth used as FM carrier (-1 = not set)

nodes.label: ModulatorIndex
nodes.description: Index of the child synth used as FM modulator (-1 = not set)

nodes.label: Pitch Modulation
nodes.description: Group pitch modulation multiplied onto each child's own pitch values

nodes.label: Gain Modulation
nodes.description: Group gain modulation applied to the combined voice output

nodes.label: Detune Modulation
nodes.description: Scales the UnisonoDetune parameter (auto-bypassed when unisono = 1)

nodes.label: Spread Modulation
nodes.description: Scales the UnisonoSpread parameter (auto-bypassed when unisono = 1)

nodes.label: UnisonoVoiceAmount
nodes.description: Number of unison voices per note (1-16). Direct CPU multiplier.

nodes.label: UnisonoDetune
nodes.description: Detune spread in semitones distributed linearly across unison voices

nodes.label: UnisonoSpread
nodes.description: Stereo spread of unison voices (0 = mono, 1 = full width)

nodes.label: Calculate Detune
nodes.description: Calculates per-unisono-voice pitch offset and stereo pan position

nodes.label: Render FM Modulator
nodes.description: FM modulator child renders (single voice, no detune). Output * gain + 1.0 -> fmModBuffer

nodes.label: Render Children
nodes.description: Each active child renders per unisono voice. Group pitch multiplied in. FM: carrier pitch *= fmModBuffer

nodes.label: ForceMono
nodes.description: Collapses child stereo to mono before unison spread

nodes.label: Voice Mix
nodes.description: Child outputs mixed into voice buffer with gain * balance * detune factors. Equal-power compensation.

nodes.label: Apply Group Gain
nodes.description: Group Gain Modulation multiplied onto summed voice buffer

nodes.label: Voice Effects
nodes.description: Group-level voice effects applied per voice

nodes.label: Voice Summation
nodes.description: All active group voices summed into internal buffer

nodes.label: Master Effects
nodes.description: Group-level master effects on summed output

nodes.label: Gain
nodes.description: Static output volume as normalised linear gain

nodes.label: Balance
nodes.description: Stereo balance

nodes.label: KillSecondVoices
nodes.description: Kills retriggered voices for same MIDI note (prevents voice buildup)

nodes.label: Audio Output
nodes.description: Stereo audio output
